underlying_goal: Complete Launchpad v3 upgrade implementation, fix code review issues, commit/push changes, and explore RWA looping applicability to Paimon
friction_detail: Failed to fetch Twitter content via standard web fetch, required user to suggest agent-browser approach.
brief_summary: User needed code review fixes applied, PR created for launchpad v3 changes, and analysis of an RWA article's applicability to Paimon — all were achieved with minor friction on tweet fetching.
